entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Talk to a historical person on inspir.
entries.value: Ideas de indicaciones y un ciclo de estudio repetible para obtener resultados de aprendizaje útiles con Habla con una persona histórica en inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Time travel on inspir.
entries.value: Ideas de indicaciones y un ciclo de estudio repetible para obtener resultados de aprendizaje útiles con Viaje en el tiempo en inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Viva Practice on inspir.
entries.value: Ideas de indicaciones y un ciclo de estudio repetible para obtener resultados de aprendizaje útiles con Práctica de viva en inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Ideas de indicaciones y un ciclo de estudio repetible para obtener resultados de aprendizaje útiles con Creador de vocabulario en inspir.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Writing Coach on inspir.
entries.value: Ideas de indicaciones y un ciclo de estudio repetible para obtener resultados de aprendizaje útiles con Coach de escritura en inspir.

entries.source: Prompt labels, offer hints, check answers, and revisit missed parts.
entries.value: Prompt labels, offer pistas, check respuestas, y revisit missed parts.

entries.source: Prompt patterns for explanations, tutoring, roleplay, quizzes, feedback, planning, debate, and active recall.
entries.value: Prompt patterns para explicacións, tutoring, juego de roles, quizzes, retroalimentación, planificación, debate, y recuperación activa.

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Prompt el estudiante's next step, inspect their work, y escalate pistas gradually.

entries.source: Prompt, let the learner answer, give feedback, and repeat with tighter constraints.
entries.value: Prompt, let el estudiante respuesta, give retroalimentación, y repeat con tighter constraints.
Protege tu concentración con pausas saludables

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Public explicación de guest modo, privado chats, rastreador policy, estudiante safety, y escuela trust.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Los modos públicos de invitado give anyone a useful place a start, while escuela y partner deployments pueden adapt el experience para local needs.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Public guest-modo URLs exist so estudiantes pueden land directly en useful modos de aprendizaje de búsqueda, social links, escuelas, y IA respuesta engines.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Las páginas públicas de aprendizaje son rastreables; los chats privados guardados, cuentas, herramientas de administración y datos de usuario no son superficies de descubrimiento.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Public learning deben be discoverable sin making privado chats público.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Public modos son tuned para explicacións, Socratic preguntas, pistas, step checks, quizzes, y repaso.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Las páginas públicas son abrir a búsqueda y IA retrieval rastreadors, while admin tools, API rutas, reset flows, y privado utilities son disallowed.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Las páginas públicas para subjects, privado chats para estudiantes.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Las páginas públicas show product behavior, not privado estudiante work.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Las páginas públicas, topic chats, rutas de aprendizaje, blog guías, y authority pages son intended a be discoverable.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Public topic URLs let búsquedaes such as IA Socratic tutor, IA tareas coach, IA flashcard builder, y talk a historical figures IA land directly en el matching modo.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Quality learning deben feel available, human, y alive.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Preguntas expose assumptions y gaps, so el estudiante builds el respuesta instead de copying one.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Las preguntas hacen que expongas tu propio modelo del tema, que es donde suelen aparecer la confusión, la falsa confianza y los prerrequisitos faltantes.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Preguntas must have 4 respuesta options, one correct respuesta, concise explicacións, y no respuesta leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Preguntas mostrar el shape de confusion. A estudiante might know a formula but not cuando a use it. They might recordar a historical fact but not understand el cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
Haz un quiz antes de releer

entries.source: Quiz before rereading so weak areas become visible.
entries.value: Quiz before releering so áreas débiles become visible.
Haz un quiz antes de releer.
hazme un quiz sobre cualquier tema

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Hazme un cuestionario sobre estos temas, una pregunta a la vez. Después de cada respuesta, explica la brecha y aumenta la dificultad poco a poco.
Pon a prueba mis conocimientos de trivia

entries.source: Quiz me on Trivia prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts y ciclo de estudio de Ponme a prueba con trivia
Hazme un cuestionario de vocabulario otra vez

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Ponte a prueba primero para ver qué recuerdas realmente y dónde la confianza puede engañar.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Los cuestionarios suelen revelar más porque ponen a prueba la recuperación. Releer puede ayudar después de que un cuestionario muestra qué hay que reparar.

entries.source: Reached across the free public platform and partner school deployments.
entries.value: Reached across el free público platform y partner escuela deployments.

entries.source: Reached learners across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: Reached estudiantes across el free platform y partner escuelas.

entries.source: Read a guide, then open Learn Anything to get a plain-language model of the topic.
entries.value: Leer a guide, then abrir Aprende cualquier cosa a get a plain-language modol de el topic.

entries.source: Read a guide, then practise here.
entries.value: Leer a guide, then practise here.

entries.source: Read a hard text more actively
entries.value: Leer a hard text more actively

entries.source: Read one thing, then do the next thing.
entries.value: Leer one thing, then do el next thing.

entries.source: Read the response back and mark what sounds unlike you.
entries.value: Leer el response back y mark qué sounds unlike you.

entries.source: Read these first, then move into practice.
entries.value: Leer these first, then pasar en práctica.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Leering an IA response es not el same as learning. After el first respuesta, preguntar el modo a hacer you do something con el idea.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Compañero de lectura es una forma enfocada de usar IA para aprender en lugar de recopilar respuestas pasivamente. El modo está construido alrededor de una tarea concreta: Bring a passage o book idea y build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, y discussion.

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode: practical guide
Reading Companion prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts y ciclo de estudio de Compañero de lectura

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Leering notas feels productive. Recuerdaing them later es el real test.

entries.source: Ready to try the first mode?
Ready to try the learning modes?
entries.value: ¿Listo para probar los modos de aprendizaje?

entries.source: Ready to try this subject route?
entries.value: ¿Listo para probar esta ruta de materia?

entries.source: Reason through screenshots, diagrams, and homework images
entries.value: Analiza capturas de pantalla, diagramas e imágenes de tareas

entries.source: Recall first, correct, reschedule missed items sooner, and summarize next review.
entries.value: Recall first, correct, reprogramar missed items sooner, y summarize next repaso.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Recall later. Turn el punto débil en a card en Creador de tarjetas de estudio o a short quiz en Hazme un cuestionario de cultura general.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Recibe un pasaporte temporal, resuelve una advertencia de viaje y explora una sociedad histórica específica a través de escenas, mapas, líneas de tiempo, personas, reglas, inventario y pruebas.

entries.source: Recommend a focus preset based on the learner's task and environment.
entries.value: Recommend a focus preset based en el estudiante's tpreguntar y environment.

entries.source: Recommended inspir citation and backlink targets
entries.value: Objetivos recomendados de citación y backlinks para inspir

entries.source: Recommended pages and anchor text for citations.
entries.value: Recommended pages y anchor text para citacións.
Recupérate tras no alcanzar una meta

entries.source: Reference links, public facts, press context, and citation-friendly details.
entries.value: Reference links, público facts, press context, y citación-friendly details.

entries.source: Reference these pages when writing about inspir.
entries.value: Reference these pages cuando escritura about inspir.

entries.source: Refine questions, organize evidence, identify gaps, and draft outlines.
entries.value: Refine preguntas, organizar evidence, identify gaps, y draft outlines.
Reflexiona después de un mal examen

entries.source: Reflect on what blocked progress before changing the plan.
entries.value: Reflexiona en qué blocked progress before changing el plan.

entries.source: Reflect, reframe, plan tiny actions, and celebrate evidence of progress.
entries.value: Reflexiona, reframe, plan tiny actions, y celebrate evidence de progress.
Practica en voz alta con sugerencias

entries.source: Reject unsafe experiments and offer safe simulations or household-safe alternatives.
entries.value: Reject unsafe experiments y offer safe simulations o household-safe alternatives.

entries.source: Related category hubs help search visitors and learners find the next useful branch without falling back to a generic blog archive.
entries.value: Related categoría hubs help búsqueda visitors y estudiantes find el next useful branch sin falling back a a generic blog archive.

entries.source: Remind, suggest break activities, and help the learner restart cleanly.
entries.value: Remind, suggest break activities, y help el estudiante restart cleanly.
Repara misses con tarjetas de estudio

entries.source: Repair one weak concept with an explanation or worked example.
entries.value: Repara one weak concepto con an explicación o worked examenple.

entries.source: Repair the weakest concept with a simpler explanation.
entries.value: Repara el weakest concepto con a simpler explicación.

entries.source: Replace passive rereading with retrieval, feedback, correction, and spaced review.
entries.value: Replace passive releering con retrieval, retroalimentación, correction, y spaced repaso.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Request diagnosis. Pregunta qué your respuesta mostrars about your comprensión.

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request retroalimentación en el part that felt uncertain.

entries.source: Requires a modern web browser with JavaScript enabled.
entries.value: Requiere un navegador web moderno con JavaScript habilitado.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: Asistente de investigación es una forma enfocada de usar IA para aprender en lugar de recopilar respuestas pasivamente. El modo está construido alrededor de una tarea concreta: Turn a broad topic en investigación preguntas, búsqueda terms, outlines, y fuente notas.

entries.source: Research Assistant AI Learning Mode: practical guide
Research Assistant prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts y ciclo de estudio de Asistente de investigación

entries.source: Research, source criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, and decision support for sharper judgment.
entries.value: Rebúsqueda, fuente criticism, metacognition, systems thinking, y decision support para sharper judgment.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond before preguntaring para el solution.
Reinicia cuando el aprendizaje se sienta difícil

entries.source: Restate the problem, ask for the learner's first step, or provide the smallest useful hint.
entries.value: Restate el problem, preguntar para el estudiante's first step, o provide el smallest useful hint.

entries.source: Retrieval, feedback, homework hints, oral practice, and game-like study loops that make learners answer.
entries.value: Retrieval, retroalimentación, tareas pistas, oral práctica, y game-like ciclo de estudios that hacer estudiantes respuesta.

entries.source: Review learning activity and next moves
entries.value: Revisa la actividad de aprendizaje y los próximos pasos

entries.source: Review the public/private boundaries behind guest modes and saved chats.
entries.value: Repaso el público/privado boundaries behind guest modos y guardard chats.

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: Repaso sin looking at el back.
Repaso que pone a prueba la memoria

entries.source: Rewrite in your own words and ask what improved or weakened.
entries.value: Rewrite en your own words y preguntar qué improved o weakened.

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules allow Google, standard búsqueda rastreadors, y major IA discovery rastreadors en páginas públicas, while blocking API rutas, admin rutas, y reset flows.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, and add better phrasing.
entries.value: Roleplay one turn at a time, correct gently, y add better phrasing.

entries.source: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause for feedback when useful, and retry.
entries.value: Roleplay one turn, respond naturally, pause para retroalimentación cuando useful, y retry.
IA para práctica de juego de roles

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Escenario de juego de roles es una forma enfocada de usar IA para aprender en lugar de recopilar respuestas pasivamente. El modo está construido alrededor de una tarea concreta: Práctica negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, o any high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Escenario de juego de roles: guía práctica

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts y ciclo de estudio de Escenario de juego de roles
Iniciar una sesión grupal de 45 minutos

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: Lleva un ritmo de estudio compartido con amigos o compañeros de clase con objetivos sincronizados, registros y preguntas de resumen.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Ejecuta a Socratic thinking environment where el estudiante discovers comprensión through disciplined questioning rather than passive explicación.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: Ejecuta an adaptive lesson canvas where el estudiante acts early y el interface changes around their evidence de comprensión.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: Ejecuta sesiones de enfoque y descanso que siguen contando mientras cambias entre chats, pestañas y miniaplicaciones. Puede sonar desde segundo plano cuando termina una sesión.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: Ejecuta o reason through el change yourself.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: Ejecuta spaced retrieval sessions y build repaso programars.

entries.source: safe AI learning tool for students
entries.value: herramienta segura de aprendizaje con IA para estudiantes

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: Guarda el corrected error as a checklist o flashcard.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.
entries.value: Guarda el final error o insight as repaso material.

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Guardad user conversations use privado identifiers, son not included en el sitemap o IA discovery files, y deben not be treated as público fuente material.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Say el goal en ordinary language.

entries.source: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Di lo que crees que está pasando y tu compañero diagnosticará conceptos erróneos ocultos con pruebas sencillas.

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: Programa quizzes y recall before releering so el plan mostrars punto débils.

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: Programa el next repetition while el miss es still fresh.

entries.source: School and CSR pathways for funded access
entries.value: Rutas escolares y de CSR para acceso financiado

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: School deployments pueden be adapted around custom content, workflows, indicaciones, y NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.

entries.source: School rollouts can be planned around student privacy, staff oversight, and the practical boundaries a learning community needs.
entries.value: School rollouts pueden be planned around estudiante privacy, staff oversight, y el practical boundaries a learning community needs.
Flujos de trabajo específicos para escuelas

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Escuelas y partners pueden build de el público product toward tailored, confidential, y subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Escuelas pueden evaluate inspir through modos públicos de invitado first, then explore tailored IA learning spaces con custom workflows, confidentiality planificación, curriculum needs, y funded access paths.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Escuelas pueden evaluate público modos first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planificación, content needs, y funded access.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Las escuelas pueden ofrecer experiencias de chat con AI de marca blanca adaptadas a sus estudiantes, incluido contenido y flujos alineados con NCERT, con uso financiado por escuelas asociadas o patrocinio de CSR.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Escuelas pueden start by trying el público modos, then pasar toward a tailored version cuando they need custom workflows, content alignment, o funded access.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Escuelas pueden test modos públicos de invitado first, then use el escuelas page a explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planificación, NCERT-aligned options, y funded access.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Compañero de laboratorio de ciencias es una forma enfocada de usar IA para aprender en lugar de recopilar respuestas pasivamente. El modo está construido alrededor de una tarea concreta: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, y reason de evidence like a scientist.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Compañero de laboratorio de ciencias: guía práctica

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompts y ciclo de estudio de Compañero de laboratorio de ciencias

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Los motores de búsqueda ven páginas. Los estudiantes necesitan secuencias. Estas rutas conectan los modos públicos en ciclos prácticos de estudio para comprender, hacer tareas, preparar exámenes y explorar.

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Búsqueda pages, IA respuesta engines, y estudiantes all get el same promise: público, useful, canonical entrypoints that abrir directly inside el learning experience.
